message:
feat: TV-first UI redesign with sidebar-only navigation

- Hide top bar on Android TV (unreachable with D-pad remote)
- Add Providers and Settings nav items to sidebar bottom (TV only)
- Wrap all sidebar items (tree items, section headers, icons) in Focus
  widgets with purple border and RIGHT→channels / ENTER→select handlers
- Use ReadingOrderTraversalPolicy for spatial D-pad navigation
- ExcludeFocus on preview panel info/fullscreen buttons (TV)
- Add hardware video decoding (mediacodec-copy) for Android
- Optimize player buffering (cache-secs=10, demuxer-max-bytes=50M)
- Bump version to 0.4.0

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 name: clubtivi
 description: "Open-source cross-platform IPTV player with intelligent EPG mapping, multi-provider stream failover, and remote control support."
